# /root
./commands ./invite ./help
bash — Invite — 80x24
./install.sh --select-type
[ SERVER_INSTALL ]

STATUS: RESTRICTED (WHITELIST REQUIRED)

Add /root to your server with full functionality.

Deployment Requirements:

  • An active server with at least 200 members
  • Intention of growing your server
  • Non-abusive usage of /root commands
  • Restricted if using bots with similar core functionality
  • Embrace the /root community spirit

Requires whitelist, request via Discord server.

ssh request_access
[ USER_INSTALL ]

STATUS: AVAILABLE TO EVERYONE

Install /root to your account to use it everywhere.

Benefits:

  • Use /root commands in any server
  • Use commands in your Direct Messages
  • Includes a functional subset of commands
  • Instant access, no whitelist needed
connect --user
github.lnk | website.lnk

[SYSTEM] /root v1.0.0-linux | Bot by snowwysillycat
